# usageregistry_target_types Data Source

Lists registered target types from the DynamoDB-backed usage registry.

This data source queries `pk = "registry#target_type"`. It does not scan the table.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "usageregistry_target_types" "all" {}

output "target_type_names" {
  value = data.usageregistry_target_types.all.names
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `names` (List of String) Registered target type names.
- `target_types` (List of Object) Registered target types and their allowed actions.

### Nested Schema for `target_types`

Read-Only:

- `actions` (Set of String) Allowed actions for this target type.
- `annotations` (Map of String) Additional string annotations stored with the target type.
- `created_at` (String) RFC3339 timestamp when the target type was created.
- `name` (String) Target type name.
- `updated_at` (String) RFC3339 timestamp when the target type was last updated.
- `version` (Number) DynamoDB-backed target type version.
